arts.ttl: Man City handed definitive verdict on John Stones goal vs Wolves as fresh evidence emerges
arts.sum: Manchester City came from behind to beat Wolves 2-1 at Molineux on Sunday in dramatic circumstances.

arts.ttl: I questioned Pep Guardiola in Man City training - he made me regret it
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has high standards and is not afraid to let his players know if they fall below them

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola shows true colours with Xabi Alonso message as clever Man City plan revealed
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly considering Xabi Alonso as a potential successor to Pep Guardiola – and the former Barcelona boss has previously spoken very highly about his fellow countryman

arts.ttl: Oleksandr Zinchenko says Man City kept him on ‘academy wages’ for three years
arts.sum: Zinchenko opens up on his time at Manchester City in his new book, ‘Believe’

arts.ttl: Arsenal want six goals in eight games striker that only Erling Haaland is better than
arts.sum: Arsenal are clearly on the lookout for another striker, and the in-form Bryan Mbeumo is being targeted by the North Londoners. Brentford’s on-fire front man is also apparently wanted by Newcastle, and with good reason. arts.ttl: Man City vs. Sparta Prague: Star player may return for "perfect game" with Pep Roulette set to be in full swing
arts.sum: Man City's Champions League clash at home against Sparta Prague on Wednesday could be a "perfect game" for Nathan Ake to make his return to Pep Guardiola's side, Citizens expert Steven McInerney from Esteemed Kompany tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola is 'increasingly expected to sign a new Man City contract before leaving in 2026' - as Spaniard approaches the final six months of his deal
arts.sum: There has been significant speculation surrounding his future, with Guardiola's contract set to expire at the end of the 2024-25 campaign - and the 53-year-old is yet to commit to a new deal.

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham eyeing January move for PL striker who Pep Guardiola hailed as 'special'
Pep Guardiola has already made thoughts on Xabi Alonso perfectly clear amid Man City plan
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's time at Manchester City will eventually come to an end and the Catalan has some clear thoughts on one of his potential successors

arts.ttl: Manchester City in contention for exciting deal, Liverpool now out of the race
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly one of the clubs in contention to hire Bayer Leverkusen manager Xabi Alonso as a potential replacement for Pep Guardiola.
